Summary: A divorced, unemployed woman becomes a bounty hunter to make ends meet, with her first big case revolving around a former high school boyfriend.
The clock is ticking as four young women have three days to navigate two cities in their one chance to extricate themselves from a diamond heist.
After assuming a dead persons identity, a callow young man is sucked into a dark and violent underworld where powerful men gamble on human lives.

Title: District 13: Ultimatum
Summary: Set two years after the action in District 13, this sequel follows Tomaso and Leito on a quest to clean up crime and corruption in the city.

Title: 13 Going on 30
Summary: When a geeky teens birthday party goes awry and she makes a wish that she could be 30, she wakes up to discover shes flash-forwarded 17 years.

Title: LIFE 2.0
Summary: Computer users across the globe log onto the virtual world of Second Life. But some users lives are dramatically consumed by this alternate reality.

Summary: In an idyllic port town on Australias west coast in the summer of 1969, carefree 16-year-old Willie enjoys hanging out with his pals and wooing a beautiful singer named Rosie -- until his mom ships him back to a Catholic boarding school in Perth.

Title: Easy Fortune Happy Life
Summary: Years after a wealthy man is healed by a rural herbalist, fate lands him in the same hospital where the womans granddaughter is treating patients.

Summary: With new songs, Bita and her class explore the sky, the ocean, the forests, the savannah and other places in the world rich in flora and fauna.

Title: Jochem Myjer: Yeeehaa!
Summary: Join comedian and musician Jochem Myjer for a roller-coaster ride of wacky dances, spirited trivia games and sublime impersonations of famous people.

Summary: DreamWorkss coolest characters star in this collection of shorts that finds B.O.B. planning a breakout, zombie carrots on the attack and more.

Title: DreamWorks Shrek Stories
Summary: Shrek celebrates a busy Christmas and a spooky Halloween, Puss in Boots is captured by soldiers, and the kingdom hosts a singing competition.

Summary: In his third show, Daniël Arends argues that good deeds are a form of self interest, and evil deeds are a hobby.

Summary: Dick Brunas classic childrens stories get a new twist in this stop-motion animated series about Miffy the bunny and her friends.

Summary: Shrek celebrates Halloween, Puss in Boots is captured by soldiers, and the gang participates in a kingdom-wide singing competition.

Title: DreamWorks Happy Holidays from Madagascar
